summary: Iteration 14: Frontend testing for responsive /refrigerator-repair page layout. Desktop (>=768px) shows old ApplianceRepairPageNew template, Mobile (<768px) shows new conversion landing page. ALL 9 TESTS PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive layout working correctly. Desktop uses ApplianceRepairPageNew template with visible main navbar. Mobile uses MobileRefrigeratorRepair component with hidden navbar (body class 'refrig-landing-active'). Breakpoint is 768px.

TEST_1_Main_Navbar_Visible.details: Main site navbar (nav.main-nav) is visible on desktop with Services, Areas, Brands, Reviews, More links

TEST_2_Breadcrumbs.details: Breadcrumbs show Home > Services > Refrigerator Repair

TEST_3_Back_Button.details: Back button is visible and styled correctly

TEST_4_Book_Online_CTA.details: 'Book Online Now' button present in hero section

TEST_6_Common_Problems_Section.details: 'Common Refrigerator Problems We Fix' section found with all problem types

TEST_7_FAQ_Section.details: FAQ section with 'How much does refrigerator repair cost?' etc found

TEST_8_Brands_Section.details: 'Brands We Service' section with Sub-Zero, Viking, etc found

TEST_1_Custom_Header_Not_Navbar.details: Body has class 'refrig-landing-active'. Main navbar hidden. Custom header with FixitBay logo + Call Now button visible.

TEST_2_Same_Day_Badge.details: 'SAME-DAY SERVICE AVAILABLE' badge present in hero

TEST_3_Trust_Badges.details: All 4 trust badges found: 4.9 Rating, Licensed & Insured, 180-Day Warranty, 500+ Repairs

TEST_4_Door_Seal_Wrench_Emoji.details: 'Door Seal Worn' problem chip uses wrench emoji (🔧), no door emoji (🚪)

TEST_5_Review_Counts.details: Reviews section shows 'Google: 82 reviews' and 'Thumbtack: 117 reviews' with '4.9 / 5' rating

TEST_6_Brand_Links.details: All 8 brand links correct: Sub-Zero → /sub-zero-appliance-repair, Viking → /viking-appliance-repair, etc

TEST_7_Final_CTA.details: Final CTA headline 'Get Your Refrigerator Running Like New' and subtitle 'Schedule Today' (not 'Don't Wait')

TEST_8_Desktop_Areas_Dropdown.details: Desktop: Clicking Areas dropdown → 'View service area map →' scrolls from position 0 to 4608. #service-area element visible.

TEST_9_Mobile_Hamburger_Menu.details: Mobile: Opening hamburger menu and clicking 'Service Areas' closes menu and scrolls from 0 to 4631. Map section visible.

verified_features: DESKTOP: /refrigerator-repair shows old template (ApplianceRepairPageNew) with main navbar visible
DESKTOP: Breadcrumbs show Home > Services > Refrigerator Repair
DESKTOP: Back button, 'Book Online Now', and phone CTA visible
DESKTOP: 'Common Refrigerator Problems We Fix' section with all 6 problems
DESKTOP: FAQ section with expandable questions
MOBILE (<768px): Custom header with FixitBay logo + 'Call Now' button (main navbar hidden)
MOBILE: 'SAME-DAY SERVICE AVAILABLE' badge in hero
MOBILE: Trust badges: 4.9 Rating, Licensed & Insured, 180-Day Warranty, 500+ Repairs
MOBILE: Problem chips with correct emojis including 'Door Seal Worn' with 🔧
MOBILE: Reviews show 'Google: 82 reviews · Thumbtack: 117 reviews' with '4.9 / 5'
MOBILE: All 8 brand links are clickable and link to correct pages
MOBILE: Final CTA says 'Get Your Refrigerator Running Like New' + 'Schedule Today'
Homepage Desktop: Areas dropdown → 'View service area map' scrolls to #service-area
Homepage Mobile: Hamburger menu → 'Service Areas' scrolls to map section
